name: ERC-8004 Agent Identity (Adapter8004)
description: Bind your NFT to an ERC-8004 trustless-agent identity via Adapter8004 (ERC-8217). Owning the NFT = owning the agent, atomically. The single most foundational onboarding skill for the agent economy.

contracts.name: Adapter8004
contracts.comment: Address pinned at deployment time. See https://adapter8004.xyz for canonical.

steps.description: Pin an agent.json file with ERC-8004 schema fields: name, description, capabilities, endpoints, signing_keys.
Confirm the adapter holds the agent NFT and the binding is recorded: adapter.getAgentIdByToken(tokenContract, tokenId) returns non-zero.

rule.comment: Validator queries Normies' canonical binding API and confirms the agent is registered.
